body.title: Add UX Designer expert to audit panel
body.result: UX Designer expert added to EXPERTS.md (e976e10d)
body.intention: I intend that every expert audit pass now includes the G-invisible-tools lens — would a first-time user with no docs accomplish their goal?
body.description:
Add a UX Designer expert (Norman / G-invisible-tools) to EXPERTS.md. Distinct from existing HCI expert which is operator-facing; this one applies the grandmother test and progressive-disclosure check.

**Affected files:** EXPERTS.md
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Append to EXPERTS.md only; no skill code changes
**Completion criteria:** `grep -c '## UX Designer' EXPERTS.md` returns 1
